{{Quote|Sergeant, you have your orders. Commence bombardment. Let's see how these vermin burn.|Bella to Trask|<ref name="JSF" />}}
'''Trask''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]] who served under [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Bella (Twi'lek)|Bella]] in [[Sabaoth Squadron/Legends|Sabaoth Squadron]] prior to the onset of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Sergeant Trask was ordered by Bella to deploy [[Trihexalon|Hex weapons]] against [[Point Modie]] on [[Maramere]], as a test of the weapon's potency. Waves of [[Hex missile]]s were launched, though they were intercepted and destroyed by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]], [[Reti]] and [[Sol Sixxa]]. Nevertheless, Trask felt the operation had been successful, though Bella ordered him to remain in the [[Karthakk system]] and destroy their newfound enemies. Flying a [[Sabaoth starfighter]], he took a small convoy of [[Hex Deployer]]s and [[Hex Bomber|bombers]] to the planet's surface. Trask attempted to personally eliminate the adversaries, but was shot down and killed by Gallia.<ref name="JSF" />

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Trask's name is revealed in dialogue during Mission 5: Poisoned Skies: "The test was a success, wouldn't you say, Trask?"
Trask can be [[Death/Legends|killed]] in this mission by locking on to the [[Sabaoth starfighter|Sabaoth fighter]] he speaks from and then destroying it.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]'' {{1st}}
